spec_match.rationale: The visible copy and code sample now describe none as a legacy alias of spaces, matching the feature conformance suite.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP clicked auto, spaces, none, and the low-vision toggle, observing dataset, labels, descriptions, and rt style changes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now mentions the low-vision mode and the legacy none alias.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now has a low-vision mode that increases rt size and switches annotation color to the high-contrast text token.

references.rationale: Cites the ChromeStatus feature link and CSS Ruby spec.

design_system.rationale: The prior raw color in the code sample now uses design-system tokens, and the live styles use CSS variables.

summary: Reading Passage now includes a low-vision rt mode and corrected spaces/none alias copy. DevTools MCP verified control updates and no console errors; the test browser reported the CSS property as unsupported, so the page's fallback note appeared.
